SESSION.NAME: defaultSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnostic session enables the default diagnostic session in the server(s) and does not support any diagnostic application timeout handling provisions (e.g., TesterPresent service is not necessary to keep the session active). A server shall always start the default diagnostic session when powered up. If no other diagnostic session is started, then the default diagnostic session shall be running as long as the server is powered.

SESSION.NAME: programmingSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnosticSession enables all diagnostic services required to support the memory programming of a server. Regardless of whether the programmingSession runs in boot software or not, the ECU shall automatically suspend logging of DTCs and suspend transmission of non-diagnostic frames when entering the programmingSession.

SESSION.NAME: extendedDiagnosticSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnosticSession is used to enable timed diagnostic service functionality (e.g., I/O control). The diagnostic functionality in this session shall also include all supported diagnostic functionality supported in the defaultSession.

DATA_FORMAT_IDENTIFIER.NAME: No Compression Method and No Encryption Method

DTC_FAILURE_TYPE.DESCRIPTION: Signal Has Too Many Transitions / Events

DTC_SNAPSHOT_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: The first time since DTC information was cleared or the DTC was aged that DTC status bit 3 (confirmedDTC) is set to 1.

DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.NAME: Operation cycle counter #2
DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: Number of operation cycles since the DTC fault detection counter last reached its maximum value of +127 (since DTC information was last cleared). The operation cycles during which the test was not completed shall be excluded

DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.NAME: DTC Fault Detection Counter
DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: The purpose of this counter is to provide a mechanism for filtering the results of a low-level fault detection process so that test results (pass and fail) can be qualified before setting any DTC status bits.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: ECU supply voltage is between 9V and 16V inclusive and ECU is running
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: if the SCCM_GSM encounters an unexpected running reset; Pass: no unexpected running reset
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: ECU has unexpected reset

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: LIN signal SFWMConfig_Status == "Not Configured". Pass: LIN signal SFWMConfig_Status != "Not Configured".
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wiping will only work in the FAST wiping position.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: LIN signal SFWMECU_Output_Status == "Output disabled no short". Pass: LIN signal SFWMECU_Output_Status != "Output disabled no short".
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wiping will work only in the FAST wiping position.

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD02 did_DD0A did_DD00 did_DD09 did_C024 did_C020 did_C01D did_C01E

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: Invalid signal has been detected fo at least 500ms. Pass: Signals are ok.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Corresponding CAN outputs will be set to "Not pressed".
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: If error occurs at FTP / HB switch: - internal stalk malfunction signal is set to 0x1 (Stalk malfunction). - Stalk position is set to 0x0 (Neutral). If error occurs at turn indicator switch: - Stalk position is set to neutral.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: Input signal has not changed for at least 2 min. Pass: Stalk switch released for at least 70ms.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Corresponding CAN output signals are set to "OFF".
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Turn Indicator will be switched off (CAN output will not be updated until fault state is not active any more).

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wiper will be switched off. (LIN output will not be updated until fault state is not active any more).

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: invalid position detected for 5sec. Pass: no invalid position.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wiper will be switched off. (LIN output will not be updated until fault state is not active any more).

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Input signal at at least one of the connector pins has not changed for at least 2 minutes.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: front wash or rear wiper will be switched off. (LIN output will not be updated until fault state is not active any more).

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Once every 400ms for setting and 100ms for clearing
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: Measured heater current is >= 12A. Pass: Measured heater current is <= 11A.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: HSW is switched off for whole ignition cycle.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Heated steering wheel will not be heated up any more.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Once every 500ms for setting and 500ms for clearing
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: Measured heater current is <= 0.0425A. Pass: Measured heater current is >= 0.0425A
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Heated steering wheel will not be heated up any more.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Steering Wheel Left Switch Pack is deactivated in "unpressed" state.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Corresponding CAN signals are set to "Not pressed".
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Steering Wheel Left Switch Pack is deactivated in "unpressed" state.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Corresponding CAN signals are set to "Not pressed".
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Steering Wheel Left Switch Pack is deactivated in "unpressed" state.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: Measured steering wheel right switch pack voltage is out of range (debounce time = 500ms). Pass: Measured switch voltage is valid for at least 40ms.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: CAN signals are set to "Init" and "Inactive".
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Steering Wheel Right Switch Pack is deactivated in "unpressed" state.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Steering Wheel Right Switch Pack is deactivated in "unpressed" state.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: MTSW switch 10 raising edges in 1000 ms. Pass: 2000 ms no intermittent failure

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: MTSW do not power the actuator of the locking mechanism.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: MTSW switch >= 30s active. Pass: 60 s no stuck button failure

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: A general electric failure of MTSW locking sensor is present if the SCCM receives different locking states from the locking sensors for 5s. Pass: if the general electric failure is not present

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: MTSW locking sensor short to gound for 500ms, Pass: no short to grund for 5s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: MTSW locking sensor inactive. The signal "TiltableSteMsgTxt_D_Rq" signal shall be sent with the value 0x5.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: MTSW no feedback from locking actuator detected (actuator does not reach final position; in rush current is not detected) for 500ms. Pass: error not exist for 5s

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: MTSW locking actuator short to gound for 500ms, Pass: only recover over Reset

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: MTSW locking actuator open circuit for 500ms, Pass: only recover over Reset

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: ECU supply voltage is between 9V and 16V inclusive and ECU is running.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Once every 10s for setting and 5ms for clearing.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: Vehicle_Operating_Modes_FD3 not received for 10s, or PowertrainData_10_FD3 not received for 10s, or Gear_Shift_by_Wire_3_FD3 not received for 10s. Pass: All messages received correctly.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: eShifter functionality affected

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Once every 10s for setting and 5ms for clearing.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: ECM_TCM_2 not received for 10s, or TCM_GSM_1 not received for 10s, or TCM_GSM_2 not received for 10s. Pass: All messages received correctly.

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD02 did_DD0A did_DD00 did_DD09 did_C024 did_C020 did_C01D did_C01E

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Anti-Lock Brake System (ABS) Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: ECU supply voltage is between 9V and 16V inclusive and ECU is running.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Once every 5s for setting and 2s for clearing.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: DesiredTorqBrk_FD3 is not received for more than 5s. Pass: DTC is cleared after 2s of correct received.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Inhibit current requested action immediately and stay in last known state (safe state) Send message out if DTC is active for more than 1500 ms If steering wheel is not tilted send out "TiltableSteMsgTxt_D_Rq" with state 0x5

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD02 did_DD0A did_DD00 did_DD09 did_C024 did_C020 did_C01D did_C01E

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Power Steering Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: ECU supply voltage is between 9V and 16V inclusive and ECU is running.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Once every 500ms for setting and 2s for clearing.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: EPAS_INFO not received for 500ms. Pass: Message received correctly for 2s.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Inhibit current requested action immediately and stay in last known state (safe state) Send message out if DTC is active for more than 1500 ms If steering wheel is not tilted send out "TiltableSteMsgTxt_D_Rq" with state 0x5 If steering wheel is tilted send out "TiltableSteMsgTxt_D_Rq" with state 0x6

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD02 did_DD0A did_DD00 did_DD09 did_C024 did_C020 did_C01D did_C01E

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Body Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: ECU supply voltage is between 9V and 16V inclusive and ECU is running. Because BCM is not connected, POWERPACK_ON shall be fulfuilled. i.e. signal PwPckTq_D_Stat has to be PwPckOn_TqNotAvail or PwPckOn_TqAvail. The signal PwPckTq_D_Stat is received on FD3CAN and PT-CAN. According to requirement of GSM, if message is received on both CANs, the PT-CAN has higher priority for the evaluation.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Once every 10s for setting and 5ms for clearing.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail if: - BodyInfo_3_FD3 not received for > 10s or - Body_Info_4_FD3 not received for > 10s or - Body_Info_6_FD3 not received for > 10s Pass: All messages received correctly.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Ignition status is set to "OFF"; "HeadLghtHiPrmsn_D_Stat" signal is set to 0x0.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: AutoHighBeam is deactivated.

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD02 did_DD0A did_DD00 did_DD09 did_C024 did_C020 did_C01D did_C01E

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Serial Data Gateway "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: ECU supply voltage is between 9V and 16V inclusive and ECU is running.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Once every 5s for setting and 5ms for clearing.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: HMI_Send_Signals_7_FD3 is not received for more than 5s, Pass: Message received correctly.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: only set DTC (Bundle2)

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD02 did_DD0A did_DD00 did_DD09 did_C024 did_C020 did_C01D did_C01E

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Restraints Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: ECU supply voltage is between 9V and 16V inclusive and ECU is running.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Once every 5s for setting and 2s for clearing.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: RCMStatusMessage2_FD3 not received for more than 5s. Pass: Message received correctly
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Inhibit current requested action immediately and stay in last known state (safe state) MTSW will not work. Send message out if DTC is active for more than 1500 ms If steering wheel is not tilted send out "TiltableSteMsgTxt_D_Rq" with state 0x5 If steering wheel is tilted send out "TiltableSteMsgTxt_D_Rq" with state 0x6 HSW will not work.

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD02 did_DD0A did_DD00 did_DD09 did_C024 did_C020 did_C01D did_C01E

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Instrument Panel Cluster (IPC) Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: ECU supply voltage is between 9V and 16V inclusive and ECU is running.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Once every 5s for setting and 5ms for clearing.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: If the input Signal "DrvInputRequired_B_Rq" (Mc_Send_Signals_2_FD3) from the Cluster not available for at least 5 seconds. Pass: Message received correctly
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Trip computer are not working.

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD02 did_DD0A did_DD00 did_DD09 did_C024 did_C020 did_C01D did_C01E

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With HVAC Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: ECU supply voltage is between 9V and 16V inclusive and ECU is running.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Once every 5s for setting and 5ms for clearing.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: Climate_Control_Data_FD3 is not received for more than 5s. Pass: Message received correctly.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: HSW does not work

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD02 did_DD0A did_DD00 did_DD09 did_C024 did_C020 did_C01D did_C01E

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Image Processing Module A

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: ECU supply voltage is between 9V and 16V inclusive and ECU is running.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Once every 5s for setting and 5ms for clearing.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: If "AhbHiBeam_D_Rq" signal (IPMA_Data) is not available for at least 5 seconds. Pass: "AhbHiBeam_D_Rq" signal is received at least once within 5 seconds.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: AHB is deactivated. LaneKeepingAid is not working.

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD02 did_DD0A did_DD00 did_DD09 did_C024 did_C020 did_C01D did_C01E

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Headlamp Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: ECU supply voltage is between 9V and 16V inclusive and ECU is running.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Once every 1s for setting and 5ms for clearing.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: If "AhbStatGfhbFdbk_D_Actl" signal (Adaptive_Headlamp_Stat) is not available for at least 1000ms. Pass: "AhbStatGfhbFdbk_D_Actl" signal is received at least once within 1000 ms.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: "AhbStatGfhbFdbk_D_Actl" signal is set to 0x00; "AhbHiBeam_D_Rq" is set to 0x0
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: AHB is deactivated.

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD02 did_DD0A did_DD00 did_DD09 did_C024 did_C020 did_C01D did_C01E

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Powertrain Control Monitor Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: ECU supply voltage is between 9V and 16V inclusive and ECU is running.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Once every 500ms for setting and 2s for clearing.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: EngineData_13_FD3 not received for more than 500ms. Pass: Message received correctly for 2s.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Inhibit current requested action immediately and stay in last known state (safe state) Send message out if DTC is active for more than 1500 ms If steering wheel is not tilted send out "TiltableSteMsgTxt_D_Rq" with state 0x5 If steering wheel is tilted send out "TiltableSteMsgTxt_D_Rq" with state 0x8

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD02 did_DD0A did_DD00 did_DD09 did_C024 did_C020 did_C01D did_C01E

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received from ECM/PCM A

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: ECU supply voltage is between 9V and 16V inclusive and ECU is running
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Once every 500ms for setting and 5ms for clearing
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: If - 3 consecutive messages of Gear_Shift_by_Wire_3_FD3 on CANFD are received with a faulted CRC, or - message Counter (TrnGearCmd_No_Cnt) of Gear_Shift_by_Wire_3_FD3 on CANFD is not updated for 1s, or - 2 unique Message Counters (TrnGearCmd_No_Cnt) of Gear_Shift_by_Wire_3_FD3 on CANFD (faulted Message counter is excluded) are received within 1s, or - 3 consecutive messages of TCM_GSM_1 on PTCAN are received with a faulted CRC, or - the Message Counter (TrnGearCmd_No_Cnt_PC) of TCM_GSM_1 on PTCAN is not updated for 1s, or - 2 unique Message Counters (TrnGearCmd_No_Cnt_PC) of TCM_GSM_1 on PTCAN (faulted Message counter is excluded) are received within 1s, or, - 3 consecutive messages of PowertrainData_10_FD3 on CANFD are received with a faulted CRC, or - message Counter (GearPos_No_Cnt) of PowertrainData_10_FD3 on CANFD is not updated for 1s, or - 2 unique Message Counters (GearPos_No_Cnt) of PowertrainData_10_FD3 on CANFD (faulted Message counter is excluded) are received within 1s, or - 3 consecutive messages of TCM_GSM_2 on PTCAN are received with a faulted CRC, or - message Counter (GearPos_No_Cnt_PC) of TCM_GSM_2 on PTCAN is not updated for 1s, or - 2 unique Message Counters (GearPos_No_Cnt_PC) of TCM_GSM_2 on PTCAN (faulted Message counter is excluded) are received within 1s. Pass: All messages received correctly.

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD02 did_DD0A did_DD00 did_DD09 did_C024 did_C020 did_C01D did_C01E

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received from Anti-Lock Brake System (ABS) Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: ECU supply voltage is between 9V and 16V inclusive and ECU is running and MTSW is coded in DE01
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Once every 500ms for setting and 2s for clearing
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: Signal "ElPwrAsstSte_B_Actl" or "SteMdule_D_Stat" of EPAS_INFO is invalid for more than 500ms, Pass: all signals are valid for 2s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Inhibit current requested action immediately and stay in last known state (safe state) Send message out if DTC is active for more than 1500 ms If steering wheel is not tilted send out "TiltableSteMsgTxt_D_Rq" with state 0x5 If steering wheel is tilted send out "TiltableSteMsgTxt_D_Rq" with state 0x6
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: MTSW does not work properly

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD02 did_DD0A did_DD00 did_DD09 did_C024 did_C020 did_C01D did_C01E

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received from Power Steering Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: ECU supply voltage is between 9V and 16V inclusive and ECU is running
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Once every 500ms for setting and 2s for clearing
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: Signal "PrkBrkStatus" of DesiredTorqBrk_FD3 is invalid for 500ms. Pass: signal is valid for 2s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: MTSW does not work properly

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD02 did_DD0A did_DD00 did_DD09 did_C024 did_C020 did_C01D did_C01E

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received From Body Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: ECU supply voltage is between 9V and 16V inclusive and ECU is running.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Once every 5s for setting and 5ms for clearing.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: "Ignition_Status" signal contains failure value 0xF for at least 5000 ms. Pass: "Ignition_Status" signal does not contain failure value 0xF.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Ignition Status signal is set to 0x0.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: AHB is deactivated. TurnIndicator is not working.

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD02 did_DD0A did_DD00 did_DD09 did_C024 did_C020 did_C01D did_C01E

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received From Restraints Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: ECU supply voltage is between 9V and 16V inclusive and ECU is running and MTSW is coded in DE01.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Once every 500ms for setting and 2s for clearing
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: The checksum RCMStatusMsg2_No_Cs or alive counter RCMStatusMsg2_No_Cnt signal (CAN msg RCMStatusMessage2_FD3) is invalid for 500ms. Pass: RCMStatusMsg2_No_Cs and alive counter RCMStatusMsg2_No_Cnt signals are valid for 2s..
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Inhibit current requested action immediately and stay in last known state (safe state) Send message out if DTC is active for more than 1500 ms If steering wheel is not tilted send out "TiltableSteMsgTxt_D_Rq" with state 0x5 If steering wheel is tilted send out "TiltableSteMsgTxt_D_Rq" with state 0x8
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: MTSW does not work

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD02 did_DD0A did_DD00 did_DD09 did_C024 did_C020 did_C01D did_C01E

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received From Image Processing Module A

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: ECU supply voltage is between 9V and 16V inclusive and ECU is running.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Once every 5s for setting and 5ms for clearing.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: "AhbHiBeam_D_Rq" signal (CAN msg IPMA_Data) contains failure value 0x03 for at least 5000ms. Pass: "AhbHiBeam_D_Rq" does not contain 0x03 for at least once within 5 seconds.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: AHB is deactivated.

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD02 did_DD0A did_DD00 did_DD09 did_C024 did_C020 did_C01D did_C01E

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received From Headlamp Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: ECU supply voltage is between 9V and 16V inclusive and ECU is running
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Once every 5s for setting and 5ms for clearing.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: If following two conditions are both true for at least 5s - CAN input signal AhbFeat_D_Stat is set to 0x0: None or 0x1: AHBC, and - CAN input signal AhbStatGfhbFdbk_D_Actl is set to 0x2: GfhbHighBeamPartlyOn Pass: inconsistent behavior does not exist
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: only set DTC

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD02 did_DD0A did_DD00 did_DD09 did_C024 did_C020 did_C01D did_C01E

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received From Powertrain Control Monitor Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: ECU supply voltage is between 9V and 16V inclusive and ECU is running and MTSW is coded in DE01
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Once every 500ms for setting and 2s for clearing
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: The checksum StewStatLimD_No_Cs or alive counter StewStatLimD_No_Cnt signal (CAN msg EngineData_13_FD3) is invalid for 500ms. Pass: checksum StewStatLimD_No_Cs and alive counter StewStatLimD_No_Cnt signals are valid for 2s.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Send message out if DTC is active for more than 1500 ms: If steering wheel is not tilted send out "TiltableSteMsgTxt_D_Rq" with state 0x5 If steering wheel is tilted send out "TiltableSteMsgTxt_D_Rq" with state 0x6. And switch off MTSW
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: MTSW does not work

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD02 did_DD0A did_DD00 did_DD09 did_C024 did_C020 did_C01D did_C01E

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Upfitter Customization Interface Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: ECU supply voltage is between 9V and 16V inclusive and ECU is running and CIM is present in DE00
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Once every 5s for setting and 5ms for clearing.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: If the SCCM Method2 configuration indicates that a CIM is present, AND if while Ignition_Status == Run AND if any of the input signals UpftrHeadLghtHi_D_Rq OR UpftrTurnLghtActv_D_Rq are missing for more than 5s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: use the previous value until receive new data
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: previous value used

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: ECU supply voltage is between 9V and 16V inclusive and ECU is running.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: If module configuration parameter DE00, DE01, DE02 or DE04 hasn't been written yet. Pass: all configuration parameter are written.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Initial configuration is active.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: not used, because config parameter 'AHB_Feature' is not relevant for V710
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: not used

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD02 did_DD0A did_DD00 did_DD09 did_C024 did_C020 did_C01D did_C01E

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: ECU supply voltage is between 9V and 16V inclusive and ECU is running.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Once every 5s for setting and 5ms for clearing.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: Voltage at temperature sensor connectors is <= 0.758V. Pass: Voltage at temperature sensor connectors is >= 0.758V and new ignition cycle.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: HSW will be switched off for whole ignition cycle.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Heated steering wheel will not heat up any more for current ignition cycle.

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD02 did_DD0A did_DD00 did_DD09 did_C024 did_C020 did_C01D did_C01E

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: ECU supply voltage is between 9V and 16V inclusive and ECU is running.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Once every 100ms for setting and 100 ms for clearing.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: Voltage at temperature sensor connectors is >= 3.203V. Pass: Voltage temperature is <= 3.203V and new ignition cycle.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: HSW will be switched off for whole ignition cycle.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Heated steering wheel will not heat up any more for current ignition cycle.

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD02 did_DD0A did_DD00 did_DD09 did_C024 did_C020 did_C01D did_C01E

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: ECU supply voltage is between 9V and 16V inclusive and ECU is running.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Once every 5min for setting and 5ms for clearing.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: Temperature sensor temperature does not increase by one deg celsius in 5 min. Pass: Temperature sensor temperature rises by at least one deg celsius in 5 min.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Heated Steering Wheel drops functionality for whole ignition cycle.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Heated steering wheel will not heat up any more for current ignition cycle.
